title: Ordering, Single Active Consumer, Keys, and Partitioning · Type Forensics
summary: An incident engineer receives a plausible but defective ordering scope and partition strategy; preserve message identity and timing, locate the first broken ownership boundary, and retain a deterministic regression case. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in ordering scope and partition strategy and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: State ordering scope across producer channel, exchange route, one queue, delivery, completion, redelivery, priority, and multiple consumers.
Partition related messages by stable business key while bounding skew, hot keys, resharding, and cross-key independence.
Use single active consumer when one active delivery stream is required and account for failover, prefetch, recovery, and throughput limits.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Inspect the failure record · Debug Ordering Scope Contract
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug messaging team handles case 7647 in a quorum queue during a planned rolling maintenance window. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to enforce partition, version, gap, and single-active evidence instead of claiming global order; keep credentials and connection URLs out of learner output; then remove the dead-letter binding and expose the resulting retention risk. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: State ordering scope across producer channel, exchange route, one queue, delivery, completion, redelivery, priority, and multiple consumers.

Inspect the Ordering Scope Contract trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Inspect the failure record · Debug Ordering Scope Contract.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for state ordering scope across producer channel, exchange route, one queue, delivery, completion, redelivery, priority, and multiple consumers. For RabbitMQ and TypeScript Publish the incident record · Debug Ordering Throughput Tradeoff, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Strict global order can scale horizontally without coordination cost.
